first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general software development and the specific gaps in their experience for the embedded networking and security role (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X, Japanese language). The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest the model relied on the redacted name or contact information.
